title: Open xNet Cloud in the desktop app with one click
summary: Your Cloud dashboard's Desktop tab now offers an "Open in desktop app" button that hands your hub to the installed app over an xnet://connect link. The app asks you to confirm before pointing itself at the hub — it never repoints silently, and only xNet-hosted wss hubs are accepted.
highlights: One-click desktop connect via xnet://connect (hub handoff)
Hard hub validation: wss-only + xNet host allowlist
